ItacPersonItem.Notes: Possibly a Venetian. Francesco Contarini, is brought in from Venice to perform on the occasion of a funeral. He joined the Ricovrati in 1600, a few months after his performance at the Academy.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
